testcase.name: test_invalid_file_type_voice_input
testcase.failure: tests/test_negative_scenarios.py:119: in test_invalid_file_type_voice_input assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 422 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_negative_scenarios.py:132: in test_invalid_file_type_exe assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_large_file_rejection

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/413, got 422 assert 422 in [400, 413] + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_negative_scenarios.py:152: in test_large_file_rejection assert response.status_code in [400, 413], f"Expected 400/413, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/413, got 422 E assert 422 in [400, 413] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

failure.message:
